rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in the target component type or implementation scope as appropriate
Preserve existing AADL architecture by only adding annex blocks, not modifying existing elements
Use visible identifiers from the current visible identifiers list when available
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
generic_rules: Maintain component type contracts in the component type scope
Place implementation-specific bindings in the implementation scope
Preserve existing connections and subcomponents when adding annex blocks
Use valid AGREE syntax for assumptions, guarantees, equations, and assignments
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks use the syntax: annex agree {** ... **};
Assume and guarantee statements use the syntax: assume "label": expression; and guarantee "label": expression;
Equation declarations use the syntax: eq name : type = expression;
Assignments use the syntax: assign output = expression;
anti_patterns: Do not use AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions
Avoid placing subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not modify existing AADL architecture when adding annex blocks
